text.message: Kinda cooked for us two lol
Shall i port? this is tough
I mean you can probably get some wheat trades but it leaves so much of board for them...
Sure I can trade some wheat
Btw i saw the post on colonist's acc, congrats
Cheers, was a nice win won't lie
If I had wheat I would
I mean black is still the threat blue and you with wood port... I wouldn't get too excited for red tbh
Yeah, i did it thinking abt space
Thought he would dismantle your city
I'm still last even with it lol
It's black all day here. So odd not blocking 8 ore tho tbh
And rb giving 31... Yeh we cooked
He went for the diplomatic approach
You have wood port that gives you a brick
Lol on what planet am i
I still have to port every card to do anything 31
You prefer me to get road to blue
He can port wood for cities...
Not sure why you're more scared of me than blue black but all good
With wood port and 695 as his city...
I've got all my good cities down
His strat relies way too heavily on resource production imo, no trade potential
Either way black probably just has it tbh
Can you pace? i can always road btch for a little while
Army... No not got the juice wanted to
Yeh I'm saying I can't pace as had no knight
Yeh ... Blue you had to pop bud lol
Too many cards to be trading... unless you offer like a couple wheat
If road sneak yeh if not next turn probably
you can do it yrself bud
Black you just win bro chill
i just feel it in the air
Ill just resource dump every turn
i need to get this mono right..
